name: fairy-tale
description: Fable/Mythos-class workflow skill package for budgeted autonomous agent execution, narrative/UI expression, spatial work, mechanism discovery, and external reconstruction adapters.

interface.longDescription: Fairy Tale packages evidence-driven, validation-gated workflows distilled from public Fable/Mythos-class reports for coding, research, workflow improvement, narrative/UI expression, spatial work, ARC-style mechanism discovery, external theoretical reconstruction adapters, and defensive security tasks.
